error_signature: Cloud Run error: The user-provided container failed to start
title: n8n worker container fails to start on Google Cloud Run
symptom: When starting the n8n worker container on Google Cloud Run, an error indicates that the container failed to start and listen on the specified port.
root_cause: The n8n worker container may not be configured to listen on the correct port, which is required by Google Cloud Run for health checks and traffic routing. Without proper port configuration, the container cannot start successfully.
fix_steps: Set the environment variable `QUEUE_HEALTH_CHECK_ACTIVE` on the worker node.
Change the Cloud Run port to 5678.
Ensure that the /healthz endpoint is monitored.
agent_instruction: Configure the worker node with the correct health check settings and port.
